overall.description: A static elevated shot from a fantasy video game showing robed characters gathered in a timber-framed courtyard. The scene features heavy wooden architecture, stone flooring, and an archway opening to a green landscape, with characters sitting at tables and moving through the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered medieval courtyard with timber framing and dining tables

agents.ego_description: stationary elevated camera observing robed figures socializing in a courtyard setting

notable_agents.action: robed figure with red collar standing near a wooden table in the foreground
figure walking through the stone archway toward the outdoor area

entered.detail: thick wooden support beams and rafters forming the roof structure
large stone arch leading to the outdoor grassy area
long wooden dining tables with attached benches
grey stone paving tiles covering the ground
wicker baskets suspended from the timber frame on the left side
green lawn and distant hills visible through the archway

segments.scene_description: A static view of a medieval-style covered courtyard with heavy timber framing and stone architecture. Several robed figures occupy the space, some seated at wooden tables while others walk through a central stone archway leading to a bright green landscape beyond. The camera remains elevated and stationary throughout, capturing the ambient activity of the characters.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, elevated perspective of a medieval courtyard where the structured shadows of timber architecture contrast with a bright exterior landscape. It begins by capturing the heavy wooden framing and stone flooring of the covered space, where robed figures are gathered in quiet activity. As the eye moves across the scene, the focus shifts from the characters seated at wooden tables to those traversing the central stone archway. The view finally opens through this portal, revealing a vibrant, sunlit green landscape that extends beyond the confines of the courtyard.
